title: For All, Everywhere
prompt: A dragon guards the hatch. Complete its proof to earn the key.
help: This room holds 3 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper. forall_intro then and_intro; each half by forall_elim on hp / hq. (2) Uses forall_and. forall_elim(T, λx. P(x) ∧ Q(x), a) then ⊢ ∀y. P(y) ∧ Q(y); by forall_and(P, Q, hp, hq);. (3) Uses forall_and_at. and_left(P(a), Q(a)) then ⊢ P(a) ∧ Q(a); by forall_and_at(P, Q, hp, hq, a);.
